questions.question: When swapping two elements of the same type inside <Transition>, what must you add to trigger the animation?
options: A unique name prop on each Transition
A :key attribute on each element, otherwise Vue reuses the DOM node
The appear prop to force re-animation

questions.question: What does the .list-move CSS class do in a <TransitionGroup>?
options: It styles the wrapper element generated by the tag prop
It animates items that shift position when a sibling enters or leaves
It defines the initial state of items before they enter the list
It controls the stagger delay between each item's animation

questions.question: Which CSS properties should you prefer for transitions to avoid expensive layout recalculations?
options: height, width, and margin for natural layout transitions
top, left, right, bottom for position animations
transform and opacity — they are GPU-accelerated and don't trigger layout
display and visibility for show/hide transitions
